calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court indicates it has received a contest email from Defendant's Counsel Michael Fluhr that the case has settled and parties wish to continue the hearing. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MITSUBISHI FUSO TRUCK OF AMERICA, INC., AFL ENTERPRISES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is off calendar, parties have settled the case. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes.)Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/CPK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Default Based Upon Mistake, Inadvertence, Surprise, And Excusable Neglect And For Leave To Defend Action
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL FLUHR OF THE SQUIRE PATTON BOGGS LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-954-0200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant AFL Enterprises, Inc.'s motion to set aside default is granted. AFL Enterprises has made a sufficient showing for discretionary relief per CCP 473(b) and granting this motion is supported by California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-25-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
